name: Favipiravir
description: Favipiravir has been investigated for the treatment of Influenza. It is a unique viral RNA polymerase inhibitor, acting on viral genetic copying to prevent its reproduction.
mechanismOfAction: Favipiravir differs from currently approved anti-influenza drugs, in that it targets influenza viral polymerase. It has been suggested that host cell enzymes (cellular kinases) convert Favipiravir into Favipiravir ribofuranosyl phosphate, a form that inhibits virus polymerase without affecting host cellular RNA or DNA synthesis.
